title: God's Descent.
content:
God is then said for to descend, when He
    Doth here on earth some thing of novity;
    As when in human nature He works more
    Than ever yet the like was done before.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "God's Descent.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
